title: Number of Subarrays with Bounded Maximum
description: Cho nums và left, right bounds. Đếm subarray mà max trong đoạn nằm trong [left, right].
approach: countLE(right) - countLE(left-1) where countLE(b) = subarrays with max <= b via two pointers.

solutions.c:
static long long atMost795(int* nums,int n,int b){ long long ans=0; int j=0; for(int i=0;i<n;i++){ if(nums[i]>b) j=i+1; ans+=i-j+1; } return ans; }
int numSubarrayBoundedMax(int* nums,int n,int left,int right){ return (int)(atMost795(nums,n,right)-atMost795(nums,n,left-1)); }

analysis.correctness: Subarray max in [L,R] iff max<=R and not max<=L-1.
